original_snippet_context: A news article detailing the birthday celebrations of Leopoldo de Bulhões, the Minister of Finance.
relevant_quote: chefe da secção da Caixa de Amortisação
justification: This mention refers to the "Caixa de Amortisação" (Amortization Fund), a distinct entity from the "Caixa de Conversão" (Conversion Fund) being debated. While related to public finance, it doesn't express any stance on the monetary conversion proposals.
